sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khua mial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Khuamial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai
ciang;
Khuamial bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding
hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A it teng hong khawm ding hi,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi;
Khuamial
bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Dahna bei ding Jesuh A
hong pai ciang,
Dahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Minthang ta ding Jesuh A hong pai
ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai
ciang,
Kahna bei ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Thaman sang ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it
teng hong khawm ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nuam la sa ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
Nuam la sa ding
Jesuh A hong pai ciang;
Lungdam khawm ding Jesuh A hong pai ciang,
A it teng hong khawm ding hi.
